symbols.name: ExcludeNull(IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Removes null values from any collection implementing IEnumerable and returns non-nullable type. Returns empty enumerable if source is null.

syntax.content: public static IEnumerable ExcludeNull(this IEnumerable source) where T : class

symbols.name: ExcludeNull(IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Removes null values from any collection of nullable value types. Returns empty enumerable if source is null.

syntax.content: public static IEnumerable ExcludeNull(this IEnumerable source) where T : struct

symbols.name: ExcludeNullAsList(IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Removes null values and returns a new List. Returns empty list if source is null.

syntax.content: public static List ExcludeNullAsList(this IEnumerable source) where T : class

symbols.name: ExcludeNull(IDictionary)
symbols.summary: Removes entries with null values from a dictionary and returns a new dictionary. Returns empty dictionary if source is null.

syntax.content: public static IDictionary ExcludeNull(this IDictionary source) where TKey : notnull where TValue : class

symbols.name: ExcludeNull(LinkedList)
symbols.summary: Removes null values from a LinkedList and returns a new LinkedList. Returns empty linked list if source is null.

syntax.content: public static LinkedList ExcludeNull(this LinkedList source) where T : class

symbols.name: ExcludeNull(T[])
symbols.summary: Removes null values from an array and returns a new array. Returns empty array if source is null.

syntax.content: public static T[] ExcludeNull(this T[] source) where T : class

symbols.summary: Removes null values from a HashSet and returns a new HashSet. Returns empty hash set if source is null.

syntax.content: public static HashSet ExcludeNull(this HashSet source) where T : class

symbols.name: ExcludeNull(SortedSet)
symbols.summary: Removes null values from a SortedSet and returns a new SortedSet. Returns empty sorted set if source is null.

syntax.content: public static SortedSet ExcludeNull(this SortedSet source) where T : class

symbols.name: ExcludeNull(ObservableCollection)
symbols.summary: Removes null values from an ObservableCollection and returns a new ObservableCollection. Returns empty observable collection if source is null.

syntax.content: public static ObservableCollection ExcludeNull(this ObservableCollection source) where T : class

symbols.summary: Removes null values from a ConcurrentBag and returns a new ConcurrentBag. Returns empty concurrent bag if source is null.
